name: Pradip Overseas Limited
summary: Pradip Overseas Limited manufactures and exports home textiles, home decors, and home furnishings in India and internationally. It offers cushions, towels, comforters, flannels, jerseys, readymade garments, and seersuckers; and home furnishing products, such as table linens, bed spreads, quilts, cushion covers, and curtains, as well as cotton and micro products. The company was founded in 1980 and is based in Ahmedabad, India.
